channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping again - repeat location, 15th March
item.description:
Fly tipping again - repeat location

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shrubland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various large potholes, 15th March
item.description:
Large wide potholes stretching across the road causing vehicle to swerve I to the other side of the road to avoid them. The area between Bexley village and the beginning of the hill.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1a, Vicarage Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture left outside, 15th March
item.description:
Furniture left outside after a move to 20 Northwold Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Once again fly tipping and overflowing rubbish from 67 queens drive onto the pavement, 15th March
item.description:
Once again at 67 queens drive rubbish has been dropped onto the pavement, making it one again unsafe and unpleasant for the entire neighbourhood. an old rotting mattress as well as an old overflowing bin, have been dumped yesterday onto the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queens Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Refuse bags and litter, 15th March
item.description:
Fly tipping on Pretoria Road, including the corner of Bull Lane. There is rubbish dumped on these roads every week, especially on weekends.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pretoria Road North, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 15th March
item.description:
Fly tip
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wernbrook Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gutters / drains are clogged up, 15th March
item.description:
Several drains and the gutters on Wernbrook Avenue and Brendon Terrace need cleaning as they are blocked and full of mud

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous amount of building waste piling up in front garden, 15th March
item.description:
Looks precarious and is overflowing onto to the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip by rail bridge, 15th March
item.description:
A number of bags of rubbish have been left on new street hill as you pass under the bridge on the right.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Street Hill, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 71 Brondesbury villas, 15th March
item.description:
Large bag

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Fly tipping at end of alley besides number 1, 15th March
item.description:
Continued fly tipping at base of tree by residents and and business on Lower Clapton road with access Powerscroft road via alley.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Powerscroft Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped sofa chair blocking pavement, 15th March
item.description:
This is a hot spot for flytipping because of the ease of access and lack of cameras overlooking. This time it's a large double sofa chair and is blocking buggy/wheelchair access to the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disgusting amounts of litter including beer cans and general rubbish, 15th March
item.description:
Next to the gas works entrance to shenstone park. Loads of rubbish spread everywhere including down the side of the gasworks. Been there for months. Disgusting mess
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 15th March
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 125, Hamilton Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous sign fitting, 15th March
item.description:
The Ringo sign on the post outside Poppa Johns is fixed to the post in a dangerous position and manner. On top of the sign not being in line with regulations the fixings stick out into the footpath by approximately 2 inches this could cause serious injury to pedestrians. On this occasion as I walked past the sign the metal strap tore through the sleeve of my coat causing serious damage I hate to think what it would do to bare skin This sign seems incompetently fixed unlike most of the other signs that have the excess strapping neatly fastened safely out of the way As to my coat could you please advise me who to contact at the council for repair or replacement. Alternatively I could always deduct the cost from my Council Tax.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Queensway, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can we have a bin put on the street please?, 15th March
item.description:
Since there's no bins at all on this whole street, we get a lot of litter. Mount Pleasant Hill, Woodmill Road etc. Please can we have a bin put in
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Hill, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 15th March
item.description:
Poor pothole fix near crossing, forming again
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thomas Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is rubbish left all along the wall outside these flats., 15th March
item.description:
People are leaving rubbish outside these flats almost daily. It is horrible to have to see everytime you walk out of your home. Please collect the stuff that is there now. I would like to suggest more is done to prevent this with regular crews coming by to collect. CCTV (signs but not sure there’s actual camera) get rid of extra bins not used by residents. Put in planters and bike storage so there is less room for people to think this is ok. I own a home here, my kids live here, we pay service charge, more needs to be done. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 166, Crystal Palace Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 15th March
item.description:
Pothole and sunken road near grid by zebra crossing
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich New Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter N1 7QH, 15th March
item.description:
Tins and Takeaway strewn around Bin area Linale House N1 7QH

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Murray Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
